Patch Set 2:

Could this be something like this: https://github.com/onap/so-docker-config/blob/master/volumes/so/config/openstack-adapter/onapheat/override.yaml#L103-L134

I'm able to provide region_id to use based on that config. Can we have something similar here? At least, supporting multiple CloudRegion, not just one?

Thanks

Patch Set 2:
